_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Ability to distinguish between problems that require machine learning and problems that can be solved more simply and reliably with rule-based logic or statistical methods.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-002 (AB, cosine: 0.451), TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.410).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.2/10 (raw 0.424). Shared vocabulary: [ability]. DCWF-only terms [analysis, perform, static] vs WIDAI-only terms [based, distinguish, learning, logic, machine, methods] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.882 (P=0.917, R=0.850). P exceeds R by 0.067 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Ability to perform static analysis." and "Ability to distinguish between problems that require machine learning and proble" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.472 ≈ STS 0.424 (gap 0.048). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ability] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.7%. Shared tokens: [ability]. DCWF-only: [analysis, perform, static]. WIDAI-only: [based, distinguish, learning, logic, machine, methods].
